indicators.name: dining tables and chairs
indicators.rationale: Dining tables and chairs are not suitable for sleep, as they are designed for sitting and eating, not lying down and resting.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is not comfortable to lie on and can be noisy, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: chandeliers and pendant lights
indicators.rationale: Bright overhead lighting can be disruptive to sleep, especially if not dimmable.

indicators.name: no visible windows
indicators.rationale: No windows mean no natural light or view, which can affect circadian rhythms and make the space feel isolated.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of dining tables and chairs, hard flooring, bright lighting, and lack of windows all contribute to an environment that is more conducive to social activities like dining and less conducive to restful sleep.
